# 🎤 Artist Overview
Vozz Rich is a dynamic US-based electronic music producer and DJ whose sound seamlessly blends Detroit house, underground rave culture, salsa, techno, and big room influences. With Mexican and Californian roots, his unique cultural fusion creates an energetic and distinctive sound that resonates across dance floors. His recent releases have garnered significant attention, particularly in the house and electronic dance music scenes.

# 📊 Performance & Draw
- Monthly Spotify Listeners: 24,778 (steady growth trend)
- Social Media Following:
  * Instagram: 4,875 followers
  * Spotify: 4,109 followers
  * Growing engagement across platforms
- Strong streaming performance with consistent monthly listener base
- Notable presence on major streaming platforms including Apple Music, Beatport, and SoundCloud

# 🎧 Recent Releases & Press
Latest Releases:
- "House Ablaze" (December 2024)
- "Safe and Sound" with Kicevski (October 2024)
- "Mi Corazon Batalla" (August 2024)
- "Breathless" with L25 (July 2024)

Notable Remixes:
- "Sofi Disco" (PAUL PARKER)
- "Dance All Night" (Jaytor)
- "Butterflies" (Artsychoke)

# 🎪 Stage Experience & Technical
Performance Format:
- DJ Sets featuring original productions and remixes
- Versatile style spanning house, techno, and big room
- High-energy performances incorporating Latin and underground elements
